title: Programmer's Paintings
description: Gives Immersive Paintings the programmer art treatment.
body:
Updates all textures in Immersive Paintings (including the frames themselves) to use programmer art textures, alongside entirely new sprites for the paintings and graffiti!

[Immersive Paintings can be found here!](https://modrinth.com/mod/immersive-paintings/versions)

[Best used with Programmer Art+](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/programmer-art-plus/versions)
